title: Make flatten memory pass default. Create lower-memory flag.

features.name: unpacked array memory with part select write
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory (reg [width-1:0] mem[size-1:0]) with part-select write operations using [base +: width] syntax to write individual byte lanes

features.name: byte write enable memory operation
features.description: Code should include a memory write operation where each byte lane is conditionally written based on a corresponding mask bit

features.name: synchronous pipelined memory read
features.description: Code should include a synchronous memory read with address pipelining using registers and a muxed output based on read enable
